creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
editors/vim fails to build when WITH_LANG is supplied (while perfectly builds w/o it)

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/editor/vim
# make WITH_LANG=uk_UA
.. checking MD5/SHA256 ...
=> MD5 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.223.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.223.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.224.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for vim/7.0.224.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/vim.
